FAQ

Order information

How do I order?

Add products to cart, enter delivery details, pay through UPI, and send the generated order confirmation.

What products are available?

Black meme t-shirts are ₹499 and funny white coffee mugs are ₹399.

Can I request my own meme?

Yes. Send the idea through the request section.

Refund policy?

Products are procured before dispatch, so confirmed paid orders are final.
